theme_archetype.description: A highly functional, professional, and trustworthy interface designed to convert. Fulfills the explicit user request of Elevated Neutrals (60%), Trust Blue & Growth Green (30%), and Hyper-Saturated Orange/Red (10%) for CTA urgency. The vibe is optimistic yet highly actionable.

colors.rule: 60-30-10 Rule strictly enforced. 60% Neutrals, 30% Blue/Green, 10% Orange/Red.

rules: No generic sans for headings. Always use Outfit.
Ensure tight letter spacing (-0.02em to -0.04em) on all headings.
Labels and overlines must be tiny, uppercase, and widely tracked (tracking-[0.2em]).

spacing_and_layout.system: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 for internal card padding to prevent collision.

grids.dashboard: Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Tight density for analytics.
grids.marketing: Tetris Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with gap-8. Asymmetrical spans.

surfaces.cards: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm. Max 8px border-radius.
surfaces.glass_header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-stone-200/50 sticky top-0 z-50

buttons.primary_conversion: The 'Big Orange Button'. Use bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-700 text-white font-semibold rounded-lg px-8 py-3 shadow-sm. Used strictly for checkout, upgrades, and final commitments.
buttons.secondary_action: Trust Blue. bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg for navigation and standard actions.
buttons.outline: border border-stone-300 text-stone-700 hover:bg-stone-50 for secondary choices.

inputs_and_forms.style: Shadcn standard but heavily customized. rounded-lg, border-stone-300, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500.
inputs_and_forms.questionnaire: Immersive, one-question-per-screen layout with a thick emerald-600 progress bar at the top.

charts_and_data.styling: Use emerald-600 for positive growth metrics, blue-600 for stable volume metrics.

pricing_cards.style: Bento-style layout. The 'Mid' tier (10 side hustles) MUST have a 'Most Popular' badge, an electric blue border (border-blue-500 border-2), and the Big Orange Button for its CTA to drive 25-35% higher conversions.

navigation.desktop: Top fixed glassmorphism header. Logo left, links center, Profile/Upgrade CTA right.
navigation.mobile: Bottom tab bar for logged-in app experience (Dashboard, Calendar, Hustles, Profile). Standard hamburger for marketing/logged-out.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1). All buttons have color shifts.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in and slide-up (framer-motion or simple CSS transition) for the questionnaire steps.
motion_and_interaction.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. High contrast focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 focus:outline-none).

media_and_icons.icons_usage: Use Duotone weight for marketing pages, Regular weight for app dashboard.

marketing_hero.description: Clean modern desk with planner and laptop. Use in the hero section for the unauthenticated landing page.
marketing_hero.placement: Landing page hero section right side or background

success_dashboard_empty_state.description: Happy person looking at phone. Use for successful onboarding, side hustle generation loading screen, or empty state.
success_dashboard_empty_state.placement: App loading screen or 'Generating Hustles' intermediate step

abstract_accent.description: Abstract blend. Use with low opacity as a background element behind the pricing tier or questionnaire section to add visual depth.

testing_and_qa.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='upgrade-pro-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use generic Inter font. Import and use Outfit for headings and Figtree for body text.
Implement the 60-30-10 color rule. Keep the background in stone-50, primary buttons blue-600, success states emerald-600, and checkout/upgrade CTAs orange-600.
For the Stripe pricing page, place a 'Most Popular' badge on the Mid-tier plan and outline it in blue.
The questionnaire should feel immersive. Hide standard navigation during the questionnaire to prevent distraction.
Ensure the generated side hustle calendar uses the Growth Green (emerald-600) to signify progress and action.
Add 'data-testid' to every button, form input, and interactive card.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) instead of lucide-react.
